TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Moldova u Moldova (Mo-El-Do-Wa śĎ©ÁąĺŚ§öÁď¶) sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 47 00 N, 29 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 33,851 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 32,891 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 960 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 3,510,485. kakalukan umah sa 74.90%, kilakilangan umah sa 11.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 13.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Chisinau . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 27 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Maia Sandu (MayaÔľéSantu ť¶¨Ś©≠¬∑ś°ĎśĚú), 1972 a mihca 5 a bulad 24 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Moldova ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihca 12 bulad 24 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Moldova ayza sa ci Aureliu Ciocoi , micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad. Ocuo sapakuyucay nu kanatal ś≠źśī≤śúÄŤ≤ßÁ™ģÁöĄŚúčŚģ∂ tasakamuan numita ku Moldova a kanatalan, mapaaw ku katuud a tademaw nayaan kiyahaw makatengil, nina Tuno adidi'ay a kanatal itini i kitakit caay katineng ku katuuday. tademaw nuheni, Moldova tulu a lasubu nu pina a wang ku tademaw, kakitidaan nu lala' hatida u Helan nika cacay a malebut enem a lasubu nu pina a mang ku tademaw. sakaudip hantu nu Moldova i Europe u sadikuday tu, sakaudip nika silaculan han caay pakaala tu tusa a malebut nu Amilika a kalisiw, u layak nu tulu nu cacayay a kelican, mikisaba' henay tu Uke-lan , Kesuo-wou . likisi nu Moldova ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłäÁöĄśĎ©ÁąĺŚ§öÁď¶ Moldova atu Romania tadacabay kunu heni, usakasa nu Moldova a katuuday nu niyadu'ay a tademaw nuheni u Luo-man a kamu nu Romania a tademaw. likisi nu Moldova a kitidaan mapulung tu Keel-pacin buyu' katukuh Pu-lu-te'sauwac a pangkiw nu nutipan, atu Pulu-te sauwac katukuh tu Denesete sawac a waliyan nu pangkiw, pitelungan nu walian a pangkiw pangangan han Bisa-labi-ya (śĮĒŤĖ©śčČśĮĒšļěBessarabia). ayda nu Moldova kunhekuo itdai Pisa-labi-ya itida, itida i Romania nutipan a pangkiw u Moldova han kiya kitidaan (Romania ÁĺÖť¶¨Śįľšļě) u Wala-ciya , Moldova atu Telan-sefan-niya nisa kaputan patideng . cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (15) a seci, Sete-fan sanse palicaden namaka i Keel-paciyen buyu' katukuh Tenye-te' sauwac a Moldova kapulunga a kanatal, malaheciya tu miwawies tu Auose-manti-kuo nu ahebal. nika nikudan satu Auose-manti-kuo midebung tu Moldova , mikuwan satu tu tusa a lasubu ku pinapina. cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (19) a seci E'se nikalpacawan, Auose-manti-kuo mademec kilacan ku Pisa-labi-ya sipabeli i Elluo-seti-kuo . tusa a bataan a seci (20), Pisa-labi-ya apuyu kunipi sitekedan, kilul satu alawan naca nu Su-lien . Su-lan hiyan ku Pisa-lapi-ya nu timulan kelicen pabeli tu Uke-lan , amisan nu pangkiw mapatideng tu "Muoel-ta-wyeya-suwyeay nu siakay a kawaw nu kunhekuo",nu aydaay a Moldova kunhekuo nu ayawan. Suodu itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan malawpes cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan (1940) a mihcaan enem a bulad sumanahay a hitay mitebung tu sudu Cisi-nau , hiyan ku Pisa-lapi-ya makelic i labu, hiyan kuu Pisa-lapi-ya a lala' atu Tenye-sete' sauwac lilis nu Muoel-taweya-suweay siakay siakay nu cece'kunhekuo mapulung. patideng tu Muoel-taweya-suweyy siakay siakay a kunhekuo, tawya cacay a bataan a bulad maninel pitu tin tulu ku tabaki nu ninel, malekep maluyuh namin ku lumalumaan nu duse. saka tusa a mihcaan, Dekuo a kungu'n kalamkan sa atayni, u liwan nu tukay a cancanan hamin han mibakudang mibuliyas. Yasi tademaw nu lalangawan ťõÖŤ•ŅšļļśįĎśĖáŚĆĖŚģģ cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (1944) a mihcaan siwa a bulad, Sulien atu Romania masaluimengn kuni kalepacawan patudud tu nipatideng tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepad a bataan (1940) a mihcaan a Sulien atu Romania a lilis. 1990ŚĻī6 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan enem a bulad misumad tu ngangan pangangan han tu"Muoela su-wey siakay kunhekuo".cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan siwa a bulad tusa a demiad Te-Nye-Se-Te sauwac mililisay mihapu misiteked tu sa, kilul sa patidengay tu Tenye-sete sauwac dadipasan mihapu misiteked, kilul sa patideng tu Tenye-sete sawac dadipasan tu Muoeta-wiya kunhe-kuo. . aydaay nu Moldova caay ka tineng ku kawaw, amica kuni kabangcal nu kakitidaan, Europe saadidiay nu kataydaan nu tademaw a kanatal. ayda nu Moldova u Europe nu pinaay u caaya henay kasi wantanay nu kanatal, kinapina miyuwkiw mangalay micumud i E'luo-selanpan ,nika caay henay paheci ku Russia . . nina kanatal tulu a mihcaan inai ku Cuotung, katukuh i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (2012) a mihcaan ,Moldova singkiw satu babalakiay a fakun ci Niku-laÔľéti-mo'huti (ŚįľŚŹ§śčČ¬∑ŤíāŤéęŚ§ęŤíā Nicolae Timofti) amala cungtun, itini i siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (917) a mihcaan misapatas aidaw kumi liliday a tademaw. Moldova bangbangcal ku limecedan, tatama atu tatayna micidek kuni ka laecus, sakatusa malpacaw tu hedek, nina niyadu mangalay micunus tu tademaw, daheked dakepen nuheni ku hitay nu De-kuo , pakawlahen nuheni mibuwah pakasiwawa. Sulien mabuliyasak satu, Moldova u sakaudip malawpes, kanatal nu tademaw kya sepat tu cacay a tademaw inai' ku kakulian, sausihan nu misausiay a tademaw, adidi'ay nu Moldova a kanatal idaw ku sepat a bataan (40) a mang nu tatayna mala pacupiyaway, Moldova a tatayna mala micidekay a masakaputay, bangbangcal namin ku nuheni, nika caay picudad, nai' kumipadangay, sisa mala aadupan nu tatamaan mala pacupiyaway. aydaay nu Moldova sakaudip nuheni hamaw satu mucelak. katukuh ayda a Moldova hamin nu Europe sapakuyucay nu kanatal, miki saba henay tu A-elpa-niya ku pakuyuc, tidaay a tademaw micidek ku tatayna saka dihiyan sa adihen.

tu nipatid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpad a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan a sur~…ĺi…ôn atu *omania a r~…ĺir~…ĺis. ****** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a t…ônj…ô-s…ôt…ô sawa ¶ dadipasan tu muo…ôta-wija kunńß…ô-kuo. . ajdaaj nu mor~…ĺdo*a ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč ku kawaw, ami ¶a kuni kabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu kakitidaan, …ôurop…ô saadidiaj nu katajdaan nu tad…ômaw a kanatar~…ĺ. ajda nu mor~…ĺdo*a u …ôurop…ô nu pinaaj u ¶aaja ńß…ônaj kasi wantanaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, kinapina mijuwkiw maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶umud i …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuo-s…ôr~…ĺanpan ,nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pańß…ô ¶i ku *ussia . . nina kanatar~…ĺ tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan inai ku ¶uotuŇč, katukuńß i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusa (****) a mińß ¶aan ,mor~…ĺdo*a siŇčkiw satu babar~…ĺakiaj a fakun ¶i niku-r~…ĺa*ti-mo Ē~ °ńßuti (******** ni ¶or~…ĺa…ô timofti) amar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtun, itini i siwa a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu (***) a mińß ¶aan misapatas aidaw kumi r~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw. mor~…ĺdo*a baŇčbaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan, tatama atu tatajna mi ¶id…ôk kuni ka r~…ĺa…ô ¶us, sakatusa mar~…ĺpa ¶aw tu ńß…ôd…ôk, nina nijadu maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶unus tu tad…ômaw, dańß…ôk…ôd dak…ôp…ôn nuńß…ôni ku ńßitaj nu d…ô-kuo , pakawr~…ĺańß…ôn nuńß…ôni mibuwańß pakasiwawa. sur~…ĺi…ôn mabur~…ĺijasak satu, mor~…ĺdo*a u sakaudip mar~…ĺawp…ôs, kanatar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw kja s…ôpat tu ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ ° ku kakur~…ĺian, sausińßan nu misausiaj a tad…ômaw, adidi Ē~ °aj nu mor~…ĺdo*a a kanatar~…ĺ idaw ku s…ôpat a bataan (**) a maŇč nu tatajna mar~…ĺa pa ¶upijawaj, mor~…ĺdo*a a tatajna mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj a masakaputaj, baŇčbaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ namin ku nuńß…ôni, nika ¶aaj pi ¶udad, nai Ē~ ° kumipadaŇčaj, sisa mar~…ĺa aadupan nu tatamaan mar~…ĺa pa ¶upijawaj. ajdaaj nu mor~…ĺdo*a sakaudip nuńß…ôni ńßamaw satu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak. katukuńß ajda a mor~…ĺdo*a ńßamin nu …ôurop…ô sapakuju ¶aj nu kanatar~…ĺ, miki saba ńß…ônaj tu a-…ôr~…ĺpa-nija ku pakuju ¶, tidaaj a tad…ômaw mi ¶id…ôk ku tatajna saka dińßijan sa adińß…ôn.
S.FORM: Moldova u Moldova (Mo-El-Do-Wa śĎ©ÁąĺŚ§öÁď¶) sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 47 00 N, 29 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 33,851 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 32,891 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 960 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 3,510,485. kakalukan umah sa 74.90%, kilakilangan umah sa 11.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 13.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Chisinau . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 27 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Maia Sandu (MayaÔľéSantu ť¶¨Ś©≠¬∑ś°ĎśĚú), 1972 a mihca 5 a bulad 24 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Moldova ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihca 12 bulad 24 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Moldova ayza sa ci Aureliu Ciocoi , micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad. Ocuo sapakuyucay nu kanatal ś≠źśī≤śúÄŤ≤ßÁ™ģÁöĄŚúčŚģ∂ tasakamuan numita ku Moldova a kanatalan, mapaaw ku katuud a tademaw nayaan kiyahaw makatengil, nina Tuno adidi'ay a kanatal itini i kitakit caay katineng ku katuuday. tademaw nuheni, Moldova tulu a lasubu nu pina a wang ku tademaw, kakitidaan nu lala' hatida u Helan nika cacay a malebut enem a lasubu nu pina a mang ku tademaw. sakaudip hantu nu Moldova i Europe u sadikuday tu, sakaudip nika silaculan han caay pakaala tu tusa a malebut nu Amilika a kalisiw, u layak nu tulu nu cacayay a kelican, mikisaba' henay tu Uke-lan , Kesuo-wou . likisi nu Moldova ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłäÁöĄśĎ©ÁąĺŚ§öÁď¶ Moldova atu Romania tadacabay kunu heni, usakasa nu Moldova a katuuday nu niyadu'ay a tademaw nuheni u Luo-man a kamu nu Romania a tademaw. likisi nu Moldova a kitidaan mapulung tu Keel-pacin buyu' katukuh Pu-lu-te'sauwac a pangkiw nu nutipan, atu Pulu-te sauwac katukuh tu Denesete sawac a waliyan nu pangkiw, pitelungan nu walian a pangkiw pangangan han Bisa-labi-ya (śĮĒŤĖ©śčČśĮĒšļěBessarabia). ayda nu Moldova kunhekuo itdai Pisa-labi-ya itida, itida i Romania nutipan a pangkiw u Moldova han kiya kitidaan (Romania ÁĺÖť¶¨Śįľšļě) u Wala-ciya , Moldova atu Telan-sefan-niya nisa kaputan patideng . cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (15) a seci, Sete-fan sanse palicaden namaka i Keel-paciyen buyu' katukuh Tenye-te' sauwac a Moldova kapulunga a kanatal, malaheciya tu miwawies tu Auose-manti-kuo nu ahebal. nika nikudan satu Auose-manti-kuo midebung tu Moldova , mikuwan satu tu tusa a lasubu ku pinapina. cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (19) a seci E'se nikalpacawan, Auose-manti-kuo mademec kilacan ku Pisa-labi-ya sipabeli i Elluo-seti-kuo . tusa a bataan a seci (20), Pisa-labi-ya apuyu kunipi sitekedan, kilul satu alawan naca nu Su-lien . Su-lan hiyan ku Pisa-lapi-ya nu timulan kelicen pabeli tu Uke-lan , amisan nu pangkiw mapatideng tu "Muoel-ta-wyeya-suwyeay nu siakay a kawaw nu kunhekuo",nu aydaay a Moldova kunhekuo nu ayawan. Suodu itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan malawpes cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan (1940) a mihcaan enem a bulad sumanahay a hitay mitebung tu sudu Cisi-nau , hiyan ku Pisa-lapi-ya makelic i labu, hiyan kuu Pisa-lapi-ya a lala' atu Tenye-sete' sauwac lilis nu Muoel-taweya-suweay siakay siakay nu cece'kunhekuo mapulung. patideng tu Muoel-taweya-suweyy siakay siakay a kunhekuo, tawya cacay a bataan a bulad maninel pitu tin tulu ku tabaki nu ninel, malekep maluyuh namin ku lumalumaan nu duse. saka tusa a mihcaan, Dekuo a kungu'n kalamkan sa atayni, u liwan nu tukay a cancanan hamin han mibakudang mibuliyas. Yasi tademaw nu lalangawan ťõÖŤ•ŅšļļśįĎśĖáŚĆĖŚģģ cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (1944) a mihcaan siwa a bulad, Sulien atu Romania masaluimengn kuni kalepacawan patudud tu nipatideng tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepad a bataan (1940) a mihcaan a Sulien atu Romania a lilis. 1990ŚĻī6 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan enem a bulad misumad tu ngangan pangangan han tu"Muoela su-wey siakay kunhekuo".cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan siwa a bulad tusa a demiad Te-Nye-Se-Te sauwac mililisay mihapu misiteked tu sa, kilul sa patidengay tu Tenye-sete sauwac dadipasan mihapu misiteked, kilul sa patideng tu Tenye-sete sawac dadipasan tu Muoeta-wiya kunhe-kuo. . aydaay nu Moldova caay ka tineng ku kawaw, amica kuni kabangcal nu kakitidaan, Europe saadidiay nu kataydaan nu tademaw a kanatal. ayda nu Moldova u Europe nu pinaay u caaya henay kasi wantanay nu kanatal, kinapina miyuwkiw mangalay micumud i E'luo-selanpan ,nika caay henay paheci ku Russia . . nina kanatal tulu a mihcaan inai ku Cuotung, katukuh i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa (2012) a mihcaan ,Moldova singkiw satu babalakiay a fakun ci Niku-laÔľéti-mo'huti (ŚįľŚŹ§śčČ¬∑ŤíāŤéęŚ§ęŤíā Nicolae Timofti) amala cungtun, itini i siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (917) a mihcaan misapatas aidaw kumi liliday a tademaw. Moldova bangbangcal ku limecedan, tatama atu tatayna micidek kuni ka laecus, sakatusa malpacaw tu hedek, nina niyadu mangalay micunus tu tademaw, daheked dakepen nuheni ku hitay nu De-kuo , pakawlahen nuheni mibuwah pakasiwawa. Sulien mabuliyasak satu, Moldova u sakaudip malawpes, kanatal nu tademaw kya sepat tu cacay a tademaw inai' ku kakulian, sausihan nu misausiay a tademaw, adidi'ay nu Moldova a kanatal idaw ku sepat a bataan (40) a mang nu tatayna mala pacupiyaway, Moldova a tatayna mala micidekay a masakaputay, bangbangcal namin ku nuheni, nika caay picudad, nai' kumipadangay, sisa mala aadupan nu tatamaan mala pacupiyaway. aydaay nu Moldova sakaudip nuheni hamaw satu mucelak. katukuh ayda a Moldova hamin nu Europe sapakuyucay nu kanatal, miki saba henay tu A-elpa-niya ku pakuyuc, tidaay a tademaw micidek ku tatayna saka dihiyan sa adihen.
